title: agropyron ichyostachyum
intro: Agropyron ichyostachyum, also known as Elymus ichyostachyum, is a type of grass native to China, belonging to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Agropyron ichyostachyum lie in its ability to cool the body, reduce fever, and alleviate coughs. It is believed to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing the throat, and promoting perspiration to remove toxins from the body. Traditionally, Agropyron ichyostachyum is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
